<u>**Statistical Learning Objectives:**</u>

1. Describe how latent-factor methods can represent each cell as a mixture of multiple transcriptional programs.
1. Explain why rank choice matters and how `K = 7` was selected from a limited sweep.
1. Distinguish CoGAPS pattern membership from expression directionality.
1. Interpret paired pseudobulk log2 fold-change summaries for targeted pattern genes.
1. Separate descriptive evidence from formal hypothesis testing and pathway validation.
